ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters of the company */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Founding date of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "stock_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "price" REAL /* Stock price */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest stock price on the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest stock price on the day */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening stock price on the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume on the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings (P/E) ratio */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield */,
  "debtequity_ratio" REAL /* Debt-to-equity ratio */,
  "current_ratio" REAL /* Current ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profits" (
  "profit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profit entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "net_profit" REAL /* Net profit */,
  "profit_date" TEXT /* Date of the profit data */,
  "profit_var" REAL /* Profit variation */,
  "gross_margin" REAL /* Gross margin */,
  "operating_profit" REAL /* Operating profit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profits_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "sales" REAL /* Sales */,
  "sales_date" TEXT /* Date of the sales data */,
  "sales_var" REAL /* Sales variation */,
  "revenue_growth" REAL /* Revenue growth */,
  "ebitda" REAL /* Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization (EBITDA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roce" (
  "roce_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ROCE entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "roce" REAL /* Return on capital employed (ROCE) */,
  "roce_date" TEXT /* Date of the ROCE data */,
  "capital_employed" REAL /* Capital employed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roce_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roce_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta of the company's stock */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the company's stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_performance" (
  "sector_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector performance entry */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector name */,
  "performance" REAL /* Performance of the sector */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sector performance data */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "access_action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_rating" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the company */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_rating_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
